daily.today_energy: Your vibe is chaotic-creative energy right now. Mars is whispering you towards bold moves, so lean into that restless feeling—it's not anxiety, it's your soul asking for something real.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, your partner needs to see the unfiltered you today. Single? Someone's noticing your confidence from across the room. Either way, authenticity is your biggest flex.
daily.career: That project you've been hesitating on? The universe is saying go for it. Your instincts are sharp and your courage is contagious. People are ready to follow your lead.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement—doesn't have to be gym energy, just get your blood flowing. Whether that's a walk, dancing, or stretching, your nervous system will thank you for the reset.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is all about recalibrating your vibe. Mercury's nudging you to pause before you speak, and honestly? That's the move. You're being called to listen more, react less. Trust what's brewing beneath the surface.
weekly.love: Someone's been noticing you quietly, and this week the universe is like 'hey, pay attention.' Whether you're single or coupled up, vulnerability hits different right now. Let your guard down just a little—it's magnetic energy.
weekly.career: Your ideas are actually worth sharing, even if they feel half-baked. This is your reminder that messy first drafts lead somewhere. Put yourself out there without needing it to be perfect. The momentum you build now matters.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentleness this week. Move in ways that feel good, not punishing. Whether that's stretching, walking, or dancing in your room—tune into what your nervous system actually needs. Rest is productive.
